description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a boxy, dark wooden exterior and rounded edges, sitting atop a simple wooden stand with four angled legs. The front features a convex glass screen surrounded by a thick bezel, with two metallic dials and a speaker grille on the left side of the screen. Two long, metallic V-shaped antennae extend from a circular base on the top of the television, giving it a classic mid-20th-century appearance. The back of the television has a vented panel for heat dissipation, and the overall construction suggests a combination of wood, metal, and glass materials. The stand is made of light-colored wood with a flat top and splayed legs, providing stable support for the television. This object would be a nostalgic fixture in an urban environment, such as a sidewalk display, garage sale, or retro-themed park installation.
description: A vintage, boxy wooden television with a convex glass screen, metallic dials, and V-shaped antennae, set on a simple wooden stand with angled legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden body, the metallic antenna on top, and the wooden stand's flat surface and angled legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the convex glass screen, thick bezel, two metallic dials, speaker grille, and the V-shaped antennae.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the vented back panel of the television and the antenna's base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth wooden back of the television, the antennae, and the full structure of the wooden stand.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, dark brown wood, matte finish, rounded corners, classic retro style
attribute_control_button_layout: two dials and a speaker grille on the front left side
